action.reasoning: Observation: Cached CLIP-B feature classifier is now the best valid checkpoint (test macro_f1=0.0049) but val macro-F1 is extremely low despite high accuracy, indicating collapse toward common classes/empty and poor macro calibration. Analysis: Further gains likely require diagnosing the current feature-space training code and validation behavior before changing loss/sampling/calibration. Decision: Inspect train_features.py and checkpoint metadata/logs so the next patch can target class-balanced macro-F1 rather than accuracy.
action.command: sed -n '1,260p' train_features.py && echo '--- model tail ---' && sed -n '100,220p' model.py && echo '--- metrics ---' && cat logs/iter_12/metrics.jsonl | head -50
